relabelled_senses.definition: To call out names from an attendance list in order to verify who is present or absent; to conduct a roll call.

literal: no literal meaning
to choose or support a particular side or position in a dispute or conflict
to be appointed as a senior barrister entitled to wear a silk gown
to take everything of value from a person by deceit or exploitation
to lead someone to a private or secluded place, often implying harm or private discussion
to cause someone to stop breathing or have difficulty breathing due to shock or force
to support or defend someone in a dispute
to accept what someone says as true without further proof
to cause someone severe humiliation or serious trouble
to accept situations as they come without excessive planning or worry
to accept a fact or assumption as true without further confirmation
to deal with difficulty or criticism calmly and effectively
to accept or deal with difficulty calmly without disruption
to be the most extreme or outrageous example of something
to accept unpleasant aspects along with pleasant ones
to deprive someone of their means of support or livelihood
to confront a difficult or dangerous situation directly and decisively
to be the most remarkable or extreme example of something, often negative
to be knocked down and counted out in boxing or suffer a decisive defeat
to undergo medical or therapeutic treatment to restore health
